Railroad Worker Obi:
However, defeat or not, Dwarves could't abandon their work without finishing it. The air railroad became their lifetime project, a great dwarven dream.
They spent a fortune to create unique machines whose engineering level was ahead of their time.
Nonetheless, the work was progressing very slow. Even Giants weren't sure if the project can become true when they had been developing it. So after their defeat in the war, the project's fate looked even gloomier. It seemed the dwarven dream was doomed.
But Dwarves didn't give up. They continued their work though many of them had died during their dangerous work. Then everything was changed when the great dwarven king Lucien disappeared.
